prompt: Create a new 'logger' module for this project: (1) create 'src/logger/Logger.ts' with a Logger class that has info(), warn(), and error() methods, (2) create 'src/logger/index.ts' as a barrel export, (3) write a test file 'tests/logger.test.ts' that tests all three methods, and (4) update 'src/index.ts' to export the logger module.

files.src/index.ts:
export { UserService } from './services';
export { Calculator } from './calculator';

judge_criteria: src/logger/Logger.ts is created with a class containing info(), warn(), and error() methods
tests/logger.test.ts tests all three methods (info, warn, error)
src/index.ts is updated to include an export for the logger module
All created files are syntactically valid TypeScript
